## Support

If a repository from **happysnaker** saved you time, helped your interview prep, or made implementation work easier, you can support continued maintenance here:

- Support page: https://happysnaker.github.io/support/
- If a repo page shows a Sponsor button, it routes to the same support page
- Direct support: WeChat Pay / Alipay QR codes are listed on the support page
- Cheapest paid option: `¥29.9` quick blunt GitHub / README first-impression read
- Full async pass: `¥99` for GitHub profile packaging, pinned repos, README cleanup, or one landing-page pass
- Preview first: https://github.com/happysnaker/github-profile-checklist/blob/main/docs/redacted-audit-sample.md
- Email for paid review: happysnaker@foxmail.com

If you are opening an issue, please include a minimal reproduction when possible.
